canonical_definition: A completion-based evaluation procedure that estimates the quality of a reasoning step by generating multiple continuations from that step and checking how often they end in the correct final answer.
papers: Accelerating Large Language Model Reasoning via Speculative Search
Understanding Chain-of-Thought in LLMs through Information Theory

relationships.paper: Accelerating Large Language Model Reasoning via Speculative Search
relationships.evidence: To evaluate the generalization of SpecSearch across thought evaluators, we test it with two PRMs—Math-Shepherd (Wang et al., 2024c) and MATH-psa (Wang et al., 2024a)—on beam search. (Section 5)
